title: Immunization catch-up review
source_review_basis: full authoritative documents inspected and archived; item-level retain/rewrite/remove/add comparisons recorded

assessment.text: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.
assessment.rationale: Supports national childhood programme and schedule context for child immunization catch-up review; no decision is generated.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults receiving immunization services, including the national childhood programme.
source.setting: All DHA-licensed public and private healthcare settings in Dubai.
source.exclusions: Direct for immunization-service documentation in Dubai; partial for a generic child vaccination workflow outside Dubai or beyond the reviewed sections.

exact_location.heading: 2. Scope; 3. Purpose; 4. Applicability; 5. Childhood Immunization Program 0 to 6 Years

source.evidence_paraphrase: Defines DHA immunization scope and the national childhood programme and schedule context.

assessment.text: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.
assessment.rationale: Supports vaccination-history review and age-appropriate catch-up without restarting solely for elapsed time for child immunization catch-up review; no decision is generated.

source.title: Guidelines for Best Practice in Immunization
source.population: Children, adolescents, and adults receiving immunization services, including the national childhood programme.
source.setting: All DHA-licensed public and private healthcare settings in Dubai.
source.exclusions: Direct for immunization-service documentation in Dubai; partial for a generic child vaccination workflow outside Dubai or beyond the reviewed sections.

exact_location.heading: 5.8 Catch-Up Immunization for Children Aged 4 Months Through 6 Years

source.evidence_paraphrase: Requires review of the child vaccination history, use of age-appropriate catch-up scheduling, and completion without restarting a series solely because of elapsed time.

assessment.text: Requires screening before each dose and identifies severe previous reaction, acute illness severity, and immunosuppression-related precautions.
assessment.rationale: Supports pre-dose contraindication and precaution screening for child immunization catch-up review; no decision is generated.
